zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
以太坊当前价格1564附近，跌破短期均线后维持弱势震荡，整体偏空结构未改，但下方支撑仍在尝试稳固，市场情绪偏谨慎整理中

MACD持续为负值并扩大下行动能，空头占优明显；价格持续低于SMA20，反弹多受压制，短期动能仍偏弱未见明显反转信号结构压制持续

下方关键支撑关注1552.8日内低点，一旦失守或将下探更低区间；上方阻力集中在1598及SMA20附近，需重点观察突破方向

操作上建议以反弹做空为主，控制仓位并严格止损；若放量突破1598上方，则短线转为观望或顺势，等待确认信号再入场避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum continues to trade in a short-term bearish structure, with price currently at 1564.12, sitting below the 20-day SMA at 1656.26. The repeated rejection near the 1598 high and failure to sustain above 1600 suggest weakening bullish momentum. Overall, the market is transitioning from consolidation into a downside-biased range, with sellers gradually gaining control as higher lows fail to hold.

Momentum indicators reinforce this bearish tilt. The MACD reading at -19.81513 signals negative momentum expansion below the zero line, indicating sustained selling pressure. Although RSI is unavailable, price action suggests sub-neutral strength, likely leaning toward oversold conditions intraday but not yet extreme. The absence of bullish divergence implies limited reversal signals at this stage, keeping momentum cautiously negative.

Immediate support is located near 1550, aligned with the recent session low at 1552.8. A break below this level could expose downside targets around 1520 and the psychological 1500 zone. On the upside, resistance remains firm at 1595–1600, followed by the 20-day SMA at 1656, which now acts as a dynamic resistance level. Reclaiming it would be required to neutralize bearish pressure.

Trading strategy favors caution in the near term. Short-term traders may consider range-bound scalping between 1550 support and 1600 resistance, prioritizing tight risk management. Swing traders should wait for either a confirmed breakdown below 1550 or a reclaim of the SMA20 before positioning. Until then, rallies are likely to face selling pressure, and upside continuation remains structurally constrained.
